name: cowork-ghc
description: Cowork GHC — desktop AI cowork product for Windows 11 local PC

scripts.build:app: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:shell
scripts.package:win: npm run build:app && npm run rebuild:native:electron && electron-builder --win --config app/shell/electron-builder.yml && npm run rebuild:native:node
scripts.verify:fast: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx --test service/tests/provider-profiles.test.ts service/tests/provider-readiness.test.ts service/tests/conversation-store.test.ts service/tests/conversation-router.test.ts service/tests/skill-catalog.test.ts service/tests/knowledge-local-repository.test.ts service/tests/knowledge-local-indexer.test.ts service/tests/knowledge-local-service.test.ts service/tests/health-router.test.ts app/ui/tests/conversation-controller.test.ts app/ui/tests/surface-registry.test.ts app/ui/tests/provider-readiness.test.ts app/ui/tests/mention-typeahead.test.ts app/ui/tests/dispatch-board.test.ts app/ui/tests/knowledge-local-panel.test.ts app/ui/tests/markdown-message.test.ts && npm run build:renderer
scripts.demo:seed: node tools/demo/seed-binary.mjs demo-workspace && node tools/demo/seed-office.mjs demo-workspace
